description: A fixed scroll-to-top button that uses a FontAwesome chevron icon and appears on most site pages.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: The back-to-top button as it appears on every page

notes: All 26276 pages share identical DOM structure and identical text/content — no props vary. The aria-label and icon are hardcoded in the component. The button likely has JavaScript and/or CSS-driven show/hide behaviour (e.g. only visible after scrolling down) handled outside this component's markup.
